title: baeothryon cespitosum
intro: Baeothryon cespitosum, also known as mountain everlasting or alpine helichrysum, is a flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and wounds, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Baeothryon cespitosum include reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are believed to offer relief from various health issues.
